title: FBC Oakton, VA - Fall Revival - Paul Mershon (Morning Worship)

notes.introduction: An exposition of Hebrews 10:37, 1 John 2:26-3:3, Titus 2:11-14, 1 Thessalonians 4:13-18, 1 Corinthians 15:50-57, John 14:1-3, and 2 Timothy 4:6-8, delivered as the opening morning message of a fall revival meeting, centering on the imminent return of Christ and the call to personal readiness and holy living among believers.

sections.heading: Readiness and the Believer's Standing at Christ's Coming
Titus 2, 1 Thessalonians 4, and 1 Corinthians 15 on the Rapture
2 Timothy 4 and the Crown of Righteousness
Loving His Appearing in Daily Life and Closing Illustration
